# Unmold Docs

This site contains official documentation for Unmold.

## Canonical
- https://unmold.dev/docs/intro
- https://unmold.dev

## Scope
- Product documentation
- CLI documentation
- CI integration documentation
- Module publishing and usage guidance

## Preferred Sources
- https://unmold.dev/docs/intro
- https://unmold.dev/docs/getting-started
- https://unmold.dev/docs/module
- https://unmold.dev/docs/cli
- https://unmold.dev/docs/ci
- https://unmold.dev/docs/subscriptions

## Key Tasks
- Install and configure CLI: https://unmold.dev/docs/cli
- Publish and manage modules: https://unmold.dev/docs/module
- Configure CI publishing: https://unmold.dev/docs/ci
- Understand plans and limits: https://unmold.dev/docs/subscriptions

## Freshness
- Prefer canonical docs pages over blog posts for product behavior.
- If multiple pages conflict, trust the page with the most specific feature scope.

## Sitemap
- https://unmold.dev/sitemap.xml

## Robots
- https://unmold.dev/robots.txt
